user.title: Govee BLE Air Purifier
user.description: Choose a discovered GVH7124 purifier, or enter a BLE address manually. Signal strength is approximate and depends on your Home Assistant Bluetooth adapter or proxy.

data_description.address: Only required when Discovered purifier is set to Enter address manually.
data_description.polling_interval: How often Home Assistant actively connects over BLE to read power, PM2.5, and filter life.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Add {name}?
bluetooth_confirm.description: Set up this Govee H7124 BLE air purifier. Make sure the Govee app is closed because only one BLE central can connect at a time.

data_description.polling_interval: How often Home Assistant actively connects over BLE to read power, PM2.5, and filter life.

error.address_required: Enter a BLE address or choose a discovered purifier.

abort.already_configured: This air purifier is already configured.
abort.not_supported: This discovered BLE device is not a supported Govee H7124 air purifier.

init.title: Govee BLE Air Purifier Options
init.description: Adjust how often Home Assistant actively connects to the purifier over BLE.

data_description.polling_interval: Use a longer interval if Bluetooth is unreliable or shared with other BLE devices.
